falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 3.5% with a bullish engulfing pattern on the daily chart
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong reversal from the consolidation phase, invalidating the HOLD signal and suggesting a breakout rather than a continuation of the unknown phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 50% above the 14-day average while the price makes a new 6-month high
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained high volume with a price breakout would confirm a shift in momentum, directly contradicting the HOLD signal and pattern similarity to a prior bottom.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60+ with a concurrent surge in open interest of 20% in the nearest expirying futures contract
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 combined with rising open interest would signal a confirmed blowoff top, falsifying the UNKNOWN verdict and indicating a reversal in the pattern.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
